records.title: Cooler sleep all night: Silentnight Cool Touch Pillow
records.description: The Silentnight Cool Touch Pillow has a specially designed fabric that feels noticeably cooler to the touch. If you overheat at night, it's a simple fix. 563 reviews, 4.0★. £30 on Amazon UK. #ad

records.title: Still waking up drenched? | Silentnight Cool Touch Pillow
records.description: The Cool Touch fabric surface stays noticeably cooler than standard pillows. Simple to use, no special care. If overheating is waking you up, this addresses it directly. 4.0★, 563 reviews. £30 on Amazon UK. #ad

records.title: Your pillow is making you hotter | Silentnight Cool Touch
records.description: Most standard pillows trap heat and reflect it back at you through the night. The Silentnight Cool Touch Pillow uses a cooler fabric to change that. 4.0★, 563 reviews. £30 on Amazon UK. #ad

records.title: Less heat disruption: Silentnight Cool Touch Pillow
records.description: Overheating is one of the most common reasons light sleepers wake mid-cycle. The Silentnight Cool Touch Pillow's breathable fabric reduces heat build-up against your face. 563 reviews, 4.0★. £30 on Amazon UK. #ad

records.title: Waking up overheated at 3am? | Silentnight Cool Touch Pillow
records.description: If heat build-up under your head is breaking your sleep, switching to a Cool Touch pillow addresses it without a complicated setup. 563 reviews, 4.0★. £30 on Amazon UK. #ad

records.title: Small change, fewer wake-ups | Silentnight Cool Touch Pillow
records.description: Swapping your pillow for the Silentnight Cool Touch means less heat trapped against your face through the night. One of the simpler fixes for light sleepers. 563 reviews, 4.0★. £30 on Amazon UK. #ad

records.title: Cooler head, calmer night: Silentnight Cool Touch Pillow
records.description: When anxiety makes sleep difficult, physical comfort matters. The Silentnight Cool Touch Pillow keeps things cooler and less distracting — one less thing working against sleep. 563 reviews, 4.0★. £30 on Amazon UK. #ad

records.title: Can't switch off at bedtime? | Silentnight Cool Touch Pillow
records.description: Physical overheating makes it harder for an anxious mind to settle. The Silentnight Cool Touch Pillow reduces heat build-up so your body has one less reason to stay alert. 4.0★, 563 reviews. £30 on Amazon UK. #ad

records.title: Overheating makes anxiety worse | Silentnight Cool Touch
records.description: When you overheat at night, your body stays on alert. The Silentnight Cool Touch Pillow's breathable surface helps reduce that physical stress. Simple product, straightforward benefit. 4.0★, £30 on Amazon UK. #ad
